prompt: Create a woodblock print of a samurai standing under cherry blossoms.
prompt_refined: Generate a Japanese woodblock print, consistent with the artistic style and composition of image 1, depicting a samurai figure standing under cherry blossoms. The samurai, dressed in traditional attire with two swords at their waist, stands centrally, with a saddled horse to their right and a squatting attendant figure to their left. A cherry tree with delicate white blossoms is visible on the left side of the scene, its branches extending across the upper portion of the frame.
objects: Squatting attendant figure to samurai's left
Cherry tree on the left side of the scene
Cherry tree branches extending across the upper portion of the frame
